decision: optional external provider adapter and model-catalogue source; not Spectra primary router

policies.warning: Blocked: local-only mode does not allow external model gateways.
Cloud fallback will send data to OpenRouter/provider. Use only after explicit approval.
External model gateway allowed with visible provider/model/cost/data-boundary controls.
Cloud calls allowed, but provider/model/cost/provenance must remain visible.

hardRules: No API keys committed to repo files.
Spectra owns routing policy and approval gates.
Log provider, model, usage/cost, data-boundary, and approval provenance.
